# CinePurr

> CinePurr is a real-time watch party platform where friends can watch movies, videos, and streams together in synchronized rooms with live chat.

## Features

- Create and join watch rooms with real-time video synchronization
- Live chat with emoji reactions and Pokémon-themed UI
- User profiles with achievements, badges, and XP leveling
- Study rooms with Pomodoro timer, lo-fi radio, and productivity tools
- Virtual pet companion that evolves as you level up
- Multiple Pokémon themes to customize the experience
- Mobile-friendly progressive web app (PWA)

## Pages

- [Home](https://cinepurr.me/): Browse public rooms, create rooms, or join via invite code
- [Register](https://cinepurr.me/register): Create a free account
- [Login](https://cinepurr.me/login): Sign in to your account
- [Study Room](https://cinepurr.me/study): Pomodoro timer, to-do lists, calculator, and lo-fi radio
- [Games](https://cinepurr.me/games): Mini-games including Abyssal Watch
- [About](https://cinepurr.me/about): Learn more about CinePurr
- [Privacy](https://cinepurr.me/privacy): Privacy policy and terms of service
- [Contact](https://cinepurr.me/contact): Get in touch with the team

## Tech Stack

- Next.js 14 with App Router
- TypeScript
- Tailwind CSS
- Prisma ORM
- Socket.IO for real-time communication
- NextAuth.js for authentication
